examples.title: Quality Management Plan Creation Process
examples.description: Algorithm for creating a quality management plan during project planning
examples.code:
PROCEDURE CreateQualityManagementPlan
BEGIN
 1. IDENTIFY_PROJECT_QUALITY_STANDARDS
 2. DEFINE_QUALITY_OBJECTIVES
 3. DETERMINE_QUALITY_METRICS
 4. PLAN_QUALITY_ASSURANCE_ACTIVITIES
 5. PLAN_QUALITY_CONTROL_ACTIVITIES
 6. ASSIGN_QUALITY_RESPONSIBILITIES
 7. CREATE_QUALITY_SCHEDULE
 8. DOCUMENT_REVIEW_PROCESS
 9. DEFINE_EXIT_CRITERIA
 10. OUTPUT_QUALITY_MANAGEMENT_PLAN
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm outlines the steps to create a comprehensive quality management plan during project planning phase, ensuring quality is integrated from the start.

examples.title: Defect Detection Efficiency Calculation
examples.description: Algorithm to calculate defect detection efficiency for quality metrics
examples.code:
PROCEDURE CalculateDefectDetectionEfficiency
INPUT: defectsFoundBeforeRelease, totalDefects
OUTPUT: detectionEfficiency
BEGIN
 IF totalDefects == 0 THEN
 RETURN 0 // No defects found
 ENDIF
 
 detectionEfficiency = (defectsFoundBeforeRelease / totalDefects) * 100
 
 RETURN detectionEfficiency
 
 // Example: 45 defects found before release, 50 total defects
 // Efficiency = (45/50) * 100 = 90%
END
examples.explanation: Calculates the percentage of defects detected before product release, helping assess testing effectiveness.

examples.title: Quality Gate Review Process
examples.description: Algorithm for implementing quality gates at each project phase
examples.code:
PROCEDURE QualityGateReview(projectPhase, deliverables)
BEGIN
 qualityGateChecklist = GET_CHECKLIST(projectPhase)
 reviewResults = EMPTY_LIST
 
 FOR EACH criterion IN qualityGateChecklist
 status = PERFORM_REVIEW(deliverables, criterion)
 ADD reviewResults, status
 ENDFOR
 
 IF ALL_PASSED(reviewResults) THEN
 APPROVE_DELIVERABLE(projectPhase)
 ELSE
 REJECT_DELIVERABLE(projectPhase)
 IDENTIFY_DEFECTS(reviewResults)
 SCHEDULE_REWORK(projectPhase)
 ENDIF
END

// Quality Gates: Requirements -> Design -> Code -> Test -> Release
examples.explanation: Implements quality gates at each project phase to ensure only quality-assured deliverables proceed to the next phase.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n = number of checklist criteria
